problem: Can electromagnetic fields generate sustained thrust without propellant — EmDrive physics
mechanism: Piezoelectric coupling in novel crystal structure
hypothesis: If Piezoelectric coupling in novel crystal structure is applied to —, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.
